title: Evidence Span
description: Schema for evidence spans with UTF-8 byte offsets and hash verification

evidence_span_id.description: Unique identifier for the evidence span

start_byte.description: Inclusive UTF-8 byte offset into text_canonical

end_byte.description: Exclusive UTF-8 byte offset into text_canonical

snippet_text.description: Optional: the actual span text for display

snippet_utf8_sha256.description: SHA-256 of UTF-8 bytes from start_byte to end_byte

prefix_text.description: Optional context before span for fuzzy re-anchoring

suffix_text.description: Optional context after span for fuzzy re-anchoring
